title: Shattered Reality
description: Modpack for the Shattered Reality server. Previously known as Mages & Heroes.
body: Previously known as **Mages & Heroes**. The modpack used for the Shattered Reality server. This modpack features magic, superpowers and a little bit of technology. Join your friends and work together or compete to help you survive an extraordinary world. Features - Backpacks (Sophisticated Backpacks) - Steampunk style technology (Create) - Magic (Hex Casting, Spectrum) - Superpowers (NBC Heroes, Echoes of Power) - Much more 6GB+ RAM recommended towards Minecraft # Join the server at ### shattered.tw25.net
